Services / Women, Infants and Children Program (WIC)

Women, Infants and Children Program (WIC)

WIC is a special supplemental nutrition program for women, infants, and children. WIC helps families get healthy food and a lot more! WIC is available at the centers listed at right and at these CMC WIC locations: Lodi WIC 2401 W. Turner Rd #470, Lodi CA 95242 | (209) 370-1750 Stockton WIC 425 N. California St #7, Stockton CA 95202 | (209) 870-5000 Tracy WIC 73 E. 10th St, Tracy CA 95376 | (209) 229-7800 For more information about the program or to apply, please visit the CMC WIC website.

Ready to get started?

Our team is here to help. Call us to schedule an appointment at a location near you.
